mapper.insert: INSERT INTO trips (id, name, cover_image_url, destination, destination_place_id, destination_lat, destination_lng, start_date, end_date, budget, currency, status, visibility, share_code, timezone, owner_id, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{name}, #{coverImageUrl}, #{destination}, #{destinationPlaceId}, #{destinationLat}, #{destinationLng}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{budget}, #{currency}, #{status}, #{visibility}, #{shareCode}, #{timezone}, #{ownerId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, FALSE, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM trips WHERE id = #{id,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER} AND is_deleted = FALSE
SELECT * FROM trips WHERE owner_id = #{ownerId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER} AND is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT DISTINCT t.* FROM trips t LEFT JOIN trip_members tm ON t.id = tm.trip_id WHERE ( t.owner_id = #{userId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER} OR (tm.user_id = #{userId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER} AND tm.status = 'ACCEPTED') ) AND t.is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY t.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE trips SET name = #{name}, cover_image_url = #{coverImageUrl}, destination = #{destination}, destination_lat = #{destinationLat}, destination_lng = #{destinationLng}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, budget = #{budget}, currency = #{currency}, status = #{status}, visibility = #{visibility}, share_expenses = #{shareExpenses}, share_notes = #{shareNotes}, description = #{description}, starting_point_name = #{startingPointName}, starting_point_address = #{startingPointAddress}, starting_point_lat = #{startingPointLat}, starting_point_lng = #{startingPointLng}, starting_point_time = #{startingPointTime}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}
UPDATE trips SET is_deleted = TRUE, deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM trips WHERE share_code = #{shareCode} AND is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.update: UPDATE trips SET view_count = COALESCE(view_count, 0) + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}
UPDATE trips SET copy_count = COALESCE(copy_count, 0) + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}
mapper.select:
WITH user_trips AS ( SELECT t.*, t.created_at as sort_date FROM trips t WHERE t.owner_id = #{userId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER} AND t.is_deleted = FALSE
UNION ALL
SELECT t.*, tm.joined_at as sort_date FROM trips t INNER JOIN trip_members tm ON t.id = tm.trip_id WHERE tm.user_id = #{userId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER} AND tm.status = 'ACCEPTED' AND t.is_deleted = FALSE AND t.owner_id != #{userId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER} ) SELECT id, name, cover_image_url, destination, destination_place_id, destination_lat, destination_lng, start_date, end_date, budget, currency, status, visibility, share_code, share_expenses, share_notes, description, timezone, owner_id, starting_point_name, starting_point_address, starting_point_lat, starting_point_lng, starting_point_time, view_count, copy_count, is_deleted, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at FROM user_trips ORDER BY sort_date DESC LIMIT 1
